docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARDJAD, BIJAN KIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOMEJOY $30.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30.00, "DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $30, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF." PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LANAE NIX--DIR. OF CLIENT SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $30.00 FILED BY FARDJAD, BIJAN KIA AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEJOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOMEJOY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 58.78 SERVED MAR-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEJOY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
